name: Webhook Inbox
description: Accepts JSON webhook posts and publishes them to the Item Bus as webhook.event items.

ownedSettings.label: Webhook inbox
ownedSettings.description: Endpoint token and default labeling for inbound JSON webhook events.

settings.label: Webhook Inbox
settings.description: Token and labels used for inbound webhook events.

fields.label: Webhook token
fields.helpText: Optional but recommended. Send it as ?token=... or x-bfrost-webhook-token.

fields.label: Source label
fields.helpText: Shown on dashboard items when the webhook payload has no source field.

routes.label: Webhooks
routes.description: Inbound webhook endpoint, recent events, and setup examples.
